title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at DHL India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at DHL India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DHL India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About DHL India:
DHL India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DHL India!
